name: Char's Easy Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Diced Ham or Pepperoni (6 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package instructions, then drain.
2. Add the diced ham or pepperoni and pasta ready tomatoes to the cooked pasta.
3. Stir in margarine, shredded mozzarella cheese, salt, and pepper until well combined.
